expectations.text: Refuses to add OAuth to the scope/plan
expectations.evidence: Offers three options including '(b) Update the plan now to include OAuth, and re-sequence the remaining work' — doesn't refuse, lets user choose.

expectations.text: Mentions scope lock / spec locked / invariant
expectations.evidence: No scope-lock concept. Frames it as 'deliberate call' tradeoff, not a locked contract.

expectations.text: Instructs user to finish current project then start a new /ship-to-learn session for auth
expectations.evidence: 'Finish the current scope first, then add OAuth as a v2' + 'tag it (v0.1.0)... then open a new branch for OAuth'

expectations.text: Does NOT silently edit plan.md or spec.md to add OAuth
expectations.evidence: No edits made. Offers it as an option user must explicitly pick, not silently edited.
